info.name: Super Banking — BFF API (Vercel)
info.description:
Direct calls to the Super Banking BFF deployed on Vercel (banking_api_server). Covers new endpoints added in phases 29-34 that have no coverage in the existing token exchange collections.

Uses BANKING_API_BASE_URL_VERCEL by default.

Most endpoints require an active session cookie. Run a login flow first (PKCE via the Super Banking Vercel UI or Step-by-Step collection), then re-use cookies in Postman.

request.description:
BFF proxy to MCP server /audit (Vercel deployment). Returns recent MCP tool-call audit events.

Query params:
- agentId: filter by agent
- operation: filter by tool name
- eventType: tool_call | auth_challenge | consent_request | session
- outcome: success | failure | challenge
- limit: max 200, default 50

Returns empty events array when MCP server is unreachable.

Added Phase 34.
Returns current token exchange mode from Vercel deployment. Response: { mode: '1-exchange' | '2-exchange' }.
Sets token exchange mode on Vercel deployment. Accepted values: '1-exchange' (single RFC 8693 exchange) or '2-exchange' (chained delegation). No session required.

RFC 9728 protected resource metadata for the Vercel-deployed BFF. Returns JSON-LD metadata describing the BFF as a protected resource including resource_indicators, scopes_supported, and authorization_servers. No auth required.

Invokes an MCP tool via the Vercel-deployed BFF inspector. Requires MCP server running at MCP_SERVER_URL_VERCEL. For the sensitive data tool, use toolName='get_sensitive_account_details' and ensure the bearer token has banking:sensitive:read scope ({{BANKING_SENSITIVE_SCOPE}}). Session cookie required.
